ucs.title: [LLM] Storm-0501 Entra ID federated-domain backdoor (Golden SAML pivot)
ucs.description: Hunts for the creation or modification of a federated/authenticated domain in Entra ID - the signature finishing move Microsoft attributes to Storm-0501 after they DCSync the on-prem AAD Connect Sync account, sign in to Entra ID as that account, and add an attacker-controlled federated domain so they can forge SAML tokens for any user (including Global Admins) without ever touching MFA.
ucs.splunk: | tstats `summariesonly` count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(All_Changes.src) as src values(All_Changes.user_agent) as user_agent values(All_Changes.result) as result values(All_Changes.object) as target_domain from datamodel=Change where All_Changes.object_category IN ("domain","directory","tenant") (All_Changes.command IN ("Set domain authentication*","Set federation settings on domain*","Add unverified domain*","Update domain*") OR All_Changes.action="modified" All_Changes.change_type="AAD" All_Changes.object_path IN ("Domain","FederatedDomain")) by All_Changes.user All_Changes.command sourcetype | `drop_dm_object_name(All_Changes)` | search NOT [ inputlookup known_identity_admins.csv | fields user ] | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime) | sort - lastTime
ucs.kql:
// Storm-0501 federated-domain backdoor - feeds from O365 Unified Audit Log -> CloudAppEvents
let SuspectOps = dynamic([
    "Set domain authentication.",
    "Set federation settings on domain.",
    "Add unverified domain.",
    "Update domain.",
    "Set DirSyncEnabled flag.",
    "Add partner to company."
]);
CloudAppEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(30d)
| where Application =~ "Office 365"
| where ActionType in~ (SuspectOps)
| extend Raw = parse_json(tostring(RawEventData))
| extend TargetDomain = tostring(Raw.ObjectId)
| extend ModifiedProps = tostring(Raw.ModifiedProperties)
| project Timestamp, ActionType, Actor = AccountDisplayName, AccountObjectId, AccountType,
          IsAdminOperation, IPAddress, CountryCode, City, ISP, UserAgent,
          TargetDomain, ModifiedProps, ActivityObjects
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Storm-0501 federated-domain backdoor in Entra ID AuditLogs
let SuspectOps = dynamic([
    "Set domain authentication",
    "Set federation settings on domain",
    "Add unverified domain",
    "Update domain",
    "Set DirSyncEnabled flag"
]);
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where LoggedByService in~ ("Core Directory","Directory Management")
| where OperationName in~ (SuspectOps)
| extend InitiatedByJson = parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy))
| extend InitiatorUser = tostring(InitiatedByJson.user.userPrincipalName),
         InitiatorIP   = tostring(InitiatedByJson.user.ipAddress),
         InitiatorApp  = tostring(InitiatedByJson.app.displayName)
| mv-expand TargetResources
| extend TR = parse_json(tostring(TargetResources))
| extend TargetDomain = tostring(TR.displayName),
         ModifiedProps = tostring(TR.modifiedProperties)
| where Result =~ "success"
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, Result, InitiatorUser, InitiatorApp, InitiatorIP,
          TargetDomain, ModifiedProps, AdditionalDetails, CorrelationId
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Storm-0501 Entra ID Federated Domain Backdoor (Golden SAML)
id: 7c3b9e1a-5d24-4e8f-9b41-storm0501fed01
status: experimental
description: |
  Detects creation or modification of an Entra ID federated / authenticated
  domain. This action is a hallmark of Storm-0501's hybrid-cloud ransomware
  playbook - after pivoting from on-prem via the AAD Connect Sync account,
  the operator adds a malicious federated domain so they can forge SAML
  tokens (Golden SAML) for any tenant principal, including Global Admins.
references:
  - https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2024/09/26/storm-0501-ransomware-attacks-expanding-to-hybrid-cloud-environments/
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G1053/
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/05
tags:
  - attack.persistence
  - attack.privilege_escalation
  - attack.defense_evasion
  - attack.t1484.002
  - attack.t1556.009
  - attack.g1053
logsource:
  product: m365
  service: audit
detection:
  selection:
    Workload: AzureActiveDirectory
    Operation:
      - 'Set domain authentication.'
      - 'Set federation settings on domain.'
      - 'Add unverified domain.'
      - 'Update domain.'
      - 'Set DirSyncEnabled flag.'
  filter_legit:
    ResultStatus: 'Failed'
  condition: selection and not filter_legit
fields:
  - UserId
  - ClientIP
  - UserAgent
  - ObjectId
  - ModifiedProperties
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate ADFS migration or hybrid-identity onboarding performed by named identity admins from an approved jumpbox
  - Tenant rebrand / domain rename projects (rare, change-managed)
level: high
ucs.rationale: Microsoft DART specifically attributes the federated-domain-backdoor pivot to Storm-0501 in its Sept-2024 hybrid-cloud ransomware advisory: they DCSync NTDS, lift the AAD Connect Sync (Sync_*/MSOL_*) account hash, authenticate to Entra ID, and run Set-MsolDomainAuthentication / New-MgDomainFederationConfiguration to bolt a malicious federated domain onto the tenant. Set-domain-authentication is es
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID

ucs.title: [LLM] Storm-0501 AAD Connect Sync (MSOL_/Sync_) account abuse from non-Connect host
ucs.description: Detects the on-prem -> cloud bridge that Storm-0501 uses: the Directory Synchronization Account (Sync_<tenant>_<hash>@*.onmicrosoft.com / MSOL_<hash>) authenticating to Entra ID from an IP / user-agent / app that is not the legitimate AAD Connect server, indicating the operator dumped its credentials from the Connect host (or via DCSync) and is reusing them to add credentials, register MFA, or modify federation.
ucs.splunk: | tstats `summariesonly` count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Authentication.src) as src values(Authentication.app) as app values(Authentication.user_agent) as ua from datamodel=Authentication where Authentication.action=success (Authentication.user="Sync_*" OR Authentication.user="MSOL_*" OR Authentication.user="On-Premises Directory Synchronization*") earliest=-30d by Authentication.user Authentication.src | `drop_dm_object_name(Authentication)` | eventstats values(src) as baseline_src by user where firstTime<relative_time(now(),"-7d") | search firstTime>=relative_time(now(),"-7d") NOT [ search index=approved_aadc_servers | fields src ] | join type=left user [| tstats `summariesonly` count as change_count values(All_Changes.command) as cmds values(All_Changes.object) as targets from datamodel=Change where All_Changes.command IN ("Add service principal credentials*","Update application*","Set domain authentication*","Add member to role*","Update user*","Reset user password*") earliest=-7d by All_Changes.user | `drop_dm_object_name(All_Changes)` | rename All_Changes.user as user] | where change_count>0 OR isnull(baseline_src) | sort - lastTime
ucs.kql:
// Storm-0501 - AAD Connect Sync account signing in from a host that is NOT the
// historical Connect server, then performing privileged tenant changes.
let Lookback = 7d;
let Baseline = 30d;
let SyncIdentities = AADSignInEventsBeta
    | where Timestamp between (ago(Baseline) .. ago(Lookback))
    | where (AccountUpn startswith "Sync_" or AccountUpn startswith "MSOL_"
             or AccountDisplayName has "On-Premises Directory Synchronization")
    | where ErrorCode == 0
    | summarize KnownIPs = make_set(IPAddress, 50),
                KnownUAs = make_set(UserAgent, 20)
                by AccountUpn;
let RecentSyncSignIns = AADSignInEventsBeta
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where (AccountUpn startswith "Sync_" or AccountUpn startswith "MSOL_"
             or AccountDisplayName has "On-Premises Directory Synchronization")
    | where ErrorCode == 0
    | join kind=leftouter Baseline on AccountUpn
    | extend IsNewIP = iff(set_has_element(KnownIPs, IPAddress) == false, true, false),
             IsNewUA = iff(set_has_element(KnownUAs, UserAgent) == false, true, false)
    | where IsNewIP or IsNewUA;
let SuspectChanges = CloudAppEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where ActionType in~ (
        "Add service principal credentials.",
        "Update application - Certificates and secrets management.",
        "Set domain authentication.",
        "Set federation settings on domain.",
        "Add member to role.",
        "Reset user password.",
        "Update user.",
        "User registered security info.")
    | project ChangeTime = Timestamp, AccountObjectId, ChangeAction = ActionType,
              ChangeIP = IPAddress, ChangeTarget = ObjectName;
RecentSyncSignIns
| join kind=inner SuspectChanges on AccountObjectId
| where ChangeTime between (Timestamp .. Timestamp + 4h)
| project Timestamp, AccountUpn, AccountDisplayName, IPAddress, Country, City,
          ISP, UserAgent, Application, ResourceDisplayName,
          ChangeTime, ChangeAction, ChangeIP, ChangeTarget
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Storm-0501 - AAD Connect Sync account abuse via Sentinel SigninLogs + AuditLogs
let Lookback = 7d;
let Baseline = 30d;
let AllSignins = union isfuzzy=true SigninLogs, AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs;
let KnownSyncIPs = AllSignins
    | where TimeGenerated between (ago(Baseline) .. ago(Lookback))
    | where (UserPrincipalName startswith "Sync_" or UserPrincipalName startswith "MSOL_"
             or UserDisplayName has "On-Premises Directory Synchronization")
    | where ResultType == 0
    | summarize KnownIPs = make_set(IPAddress, 50),
                KnownUAs = make_set(UserAgent, 20)
                by UserPrincipalName;
let RecentSyncSignIns = AllSignins
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
    | where (UserPrincipalName startswith "Sync_" or UserPrincipalName startswith "MSOL_"
             or UserDisplayName has "On-Premises Directory Synchronization")
    | where ResultType == 0
    | join kind=leftouter KnownSyncIPs on UserPrincipalName
    | extend IsNewIP = iff(set_has_element(KnownIPs, IPAddress) == false, true, false),
             IsNewUA = iff(set_has_element(KnownUAs, UserAgent) == false, true, false),
             Country = tostring(parse_json(tostring(LocationDetails)).countryOrRegion)
    | where IsNewIP or IsNewUA
    | project SigninTime = TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, UserId, IPAddress,
              Country, UserAgent, AppDisplayName, ResourceDisplayName, IsNewIP, IsNewUA;
let SuspectAudit = AuditLogs
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
    | where OperationName in~ (
        "Add service principal credentials",
        "Update application Certificates and secrets management",
        "Set domain authentication",
        "Set federation settings on domain",
        "Add member to role",
        "Reset user password",
        "Update user",
        "User registered security info")
    | extend Initiator = tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).user.userPrincipalName),
             InitiatorIP = tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).user.ipAddress)
    | project ChangeTime = TimeGenerated, OperationName, Initiator, InitiatorIP, Result, TargetResources;
RecentSyncSignIns
| join kind=inner SuspectAudit on $left.UserPrincipalName == $right.Initiator
| where ChangeTime between (SigninTime .. SigninTime + 4h)
| project SigninTime, ChangeTime, UserPrincipalName, IPAddress, Country, UserAgent,
          AppDisplayName, IsNewIP, IsNewUA, OperationName, Result, InitiatorIP, TargetResources
| order by SigninTime desc
ucs.rationale: Storm-0501 (Microsoft G1053) is uniquely characterised by its on-prem -> cloud pivot: after compromising the Entra Connect Sync (AAD Connect) server they dump the Directory Synchronization Account (named Sync_<tenant>_<hash> in cloud / MSOL_<hash> on-prem) and reuse it from a non-Connect host to enable the federated-domain backdoor and to add MFA/credentials to high-value accounts.
